prompt.description: Text prompt describing what image to generate.

width.description: Image width. Must be paired with matching height per aspect ratio.

height.description: Image height. Must be paired with matching width per aspect ratio.

quality.description: Generation quality level. Always HIGH — we want best quality. NOTE: replaces the deprecated `mode` parameter (deprecated 2026-05-04).

prompt_enhance.description: Auto-enhance the prompt before generation. Always ON.

quantity.description: Number of images per request. Always 1 — single best output.

public.description: Whether the generation is publicly visible.

rules: ONLY 3 aspect ratios: 2:3, 1:1, 3:2 — no other ratios exist for this model.
DO NOT set style — this model has no style parameter.
DO NOT set negativePrompt — this model has no negative prompt parameter.
DO NOT set imageSize (1K/2K) — not a parameter on this model.
DO NOT set mode — `mode` (FAST|QUALITY|ULTRA) is DEPRECATED as of 2026-05-04 and will FAIL after that date. Use `quality` (LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH) instead.
Only user-facing choice is aspect ratio (2:3, 1:1, or 3:2) — pick based on prompt scene.
guidances.image_reference is optional — use for img2img / reference-based generation.
Width/height must match one of the 3 aspect ratio pairs exactly — no custom dimensions.
